    GetLatest --> WriteLatest[Write to Latest S3 Path]
    WriteLatest --> End([Script End])

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Script
    participant Spark
    participant PostgreSQL
    participant S3
    
    Script->>Script: Parse sys.argv for config
    Script->>Spark: Initialize SparkContext(master="yarn")
    Script->>Spark: Configure timeout & settings
    Script->>Spark: Create SQLContext
    Script->>PostgreSQL: Query max(id) from table
    alt Max ID found
        PostgreSQL-->>Script: Return max_id
    else Error
        Script->>Script: Set max_id = 200000000
    end
    Script->>PostgreSQL: Read full table with partitioning
    PostgreSQL-->>Script: Return DataFrame
    Script->>S3: Write DataFrame to versioned path
    Script->>Script: Calculate latest path
    Script->>S3: Write DataFrame to latest path
```
